description: Cell shape (TS-036, BHV-501): visible cell shows verse text in context (Paragraphs[0].Items containing CLVerse + CLText), and PunctuationSequence (XmlIgnore) is the comparison key. Tests the dual-field model resolved by FLAG-CONS-01.

method.description: Static BuildRows entry point that exercises the full pipeline: factory creates CLPunctuationDataSource, GetCellsForBook builds CLPunctuationCells (visible Items + PunctuationSequence), CLRowsBuilder aligns rows.

EXO.0: \id EXO \c 20 \p \v 1 one. another! \v 2 two? \v 3 three! \v 4 four with no punctuation

preconditions.description: Test ScrText loaded with EXO 20 punctuation content. Run BuildRows and inspect Rows[0].Cells[0].
